svg.title: aDNA vault network topology — 68 vaults, 14 edges
svg.desc: A directed graph of the aDNA network: 68 vaults joined by 14 cited relationships (umbrella, federation, partner, companion, supersedes). Vaults with no cited relationship yet sit in the "not yet linked" holding area. Each box names a vault and its persona; the accompanying vault list is the keyboard-navigable twin.
